name: Equity Office Properties Trust
description: Equity Office Properties Trust was a publicly traded real estate investment trust (REIT) that owned and managed office buildings. Founded by Sam Zell in 1976, it grew to become the largest owner of office buildings in the United States. The company was acquired by The Blackstone Group in 2007 for $39 billion in one of the largest leveraged buyout transactions in history, after which its portfolio was largely sold off to various buyers.
